understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` within the turn/step limit, across multiple levels and with 2 attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player moves on a grid with gravity (DOWN means falling to lowest Y in column); clicking removes specific tiles; landing on spikes ends the run; each level has 50 turns per attempt and restarts on failure.
